{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Steel shield
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Charity]]'s shield is a heavy slab of metal with a twisting, grinning face.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4">''Bloodline'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
